title: Genshin Impact Yae Miko GUI
description: Yae Miko-themed Minecraft UI pack with elegant visuals inspired by Genshin Impact.
body:
#   🌸 **Yae Miko** GUI Pack 🌸 

- Transform your Minecraft experience with a complete GUI overhaul inspired by Yae Miko from Genshin Impact!
Every interface has been redesigned with elegant sakura tones, soft pink highlights, and refined shrine-inspired details to reflect Yae’s graceful yet cunning personality.

##   ✨ Features:

 **Fully** reworked:

- inventory
  
- Crafting table & furnace screens
  
- Villager trading interface
  
- Chests

- and more!

 🌸 **Perfect for Genshin Impact fans** who want their Minecraft to feel elegant, aesthetic, and blessed by the Guuji of the Grand Narukami Shrine.
  
- Genshin Impact and its characters are property of HoYoverse.
- This is an unofficial fan-made resource pack.
